title: Sensor polling + threshold diagnostics + health report
when: Reading sensors/telemetry and producing diagnostics, alerts, or a health status
principle: Poll on a fixed interval; validate/clamp each reading (reject NaN/out-of-range); compare against per-metric thresholds (warn/critical); smooth noisy signals (moving average); emit a structured health report (status + offending metrics + timestamp); degrade gracefully if a sensor is unreachable (mark stale, don't crash). Keep thresholds in config, not hardcoded.
exemplar: if crit is not None and value >= crit: return 'critical'
if warn is not None and value >= warn: return 'warn'
if v is None: report['metrics'][m]={'status':'stale'}; continue
pitfalls: Crashing on a missing/NaN reading, hardcoded thresholds, no smoothing (alert flapping), no stale-data handling, blocking the poll loop on a slow sensor.
